## What does this PR do?
<!-- One sentence. Link the issue: Closes #XX -->

## Type of change
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Data pipeline change
- [ ] ML model change
- [ ] Infrastructure / CI change
- [ ] Farmer-facing change (requires UX review)

## Checklist
- [ ] Tests written and passing (`pytest` locally)
- [ ] Ruff lint passing (`ruff check .`)
- [ ] No secrets or PII in code or logs
- [ ] If DB schema changed: migration is reversible
- [ ] If farmer-facing: Gujarati copy reviewed
- [ ] `data/sources.md` updated if new data source added
- [ ] Model version bumped if ML model changed
